pages.name: index.html
pages.editableElements:
#top .hero__copy .eyebrow :field(name:heroEyebrow, type:string),
#top .hero__title :field(name:heroTitle, type:string),
#top .hero__lead :field(name:heroLead, type:text),
#top .hero__cta .btn-primary :field(name:heroPrimaryCta, type:link),
#top .hero__cta .btn-ghost :field(name:heroSecondaryCta, type:link),
#top .hero__trust span:last-child :field(name:heroTrustText, type:string),
#top .hero__media img :field(name:heroImage, type:image),
#top .hero__badge :field(name:heroBadge, type:string),
#top .roasters__row :field(name:roastersList, type:array, options(layout:list)),
#how-it-works .section-head .eyebrow :field(name:howEyebrow, type:string),
#how-it-works .section-head h2 :field(name:howTitle, type:string),
#how-it-works .section-head p :field(name:howText, type:text),
#how-it-works .steps :field(name:howSteps, type:array, options(layout:list)),
#plans .section-head .eyebrow :field(name:plansEyebrow, type:string),
#plans .section-head h2 :field(name:plansTitle, type:string),
#plans .section-head p :field(name:plansText, type:text),
#plans .plans :field(name:plansTiers, type:array, options(layout:list)),
#beans .feature-roast__media img :field(name:beanImage, type:image),
#beans .feature-roast__copy .eyebrow :field(name:beanEyebrow, type:string),
#beans .feature-roast__copy h2 :field(name:beanTitle, type:string),
#beans .feature-roast__copy p :field(name:beanText, type:text),
#beans .feature-roast__meta :field(name:beanMeta, type:array, options(layout:list)),
#beans .feature-roast__copy .btn-primary :field(name:beanCta, type:link),
#reviews .section-head .eyebrow :field(name:reviewsEyebrow, type:string),
#reviews .section-head h2 :field(name:reviewsTitle, type:string),
#reviews .section-head p :field(name:reviewsText, type:text),
#reviews .testimonials :field(name:reviewsList, type:array, options(layout:list)),
#faq .section-head .eyebrow :field(name:faqEyebrow, type:string),
#faq .section-head h2 :field(name:faqTitle, type:string),
#faq .faq :field(name:faqList, type:array, options(layout:list)),
.cta-band h2 :field(name:ctaTitle, type:string),
.cta-band p :field(name:ctaText, type:text),
.cta-band .btn-primary :field(name:ctaButton, type:link)

content.heroTitle: Skip the shop. Brew better coffee at home.
content.heroLead: Freshly roasted beans from award-winning craft roasters, delivered exactly on your schedule. Stale supermarket coffee is a thing of the past.

heroImage.alt: A clear glass cup of coffee being poured, showing rich crema

content.howTitle: Craft coffee in three simple steps

howSteps.html:
Choose your beans

Select from single origins, rich blends, or decaf. Tell us your taste and we'll match you with the perfect roast.
howSteps.text: Choose your beans Select from single origins, rich blends, or decaf. Tell us your taste and we'll match you with the perfect roast.

howSteps.html:
Set your schedule

Pick how often you want it. Every week, every two weeks, or monthly. You're always in complete control.
howSteps.text: Set your schedule Pick how often you want it. Every week, every two weeks, or monthly. You're always in complete control.

howSteps.html:
We roast & ship

Your beans are roasted fresh to order and shipped within 24 hours. Free shipping, every single time.
howSteps.text: We roast & ship Your beans are roasted fresh to order and shipped within 24 hours. Free shipping, every single time.

howSteps.html:
Brew & enjoy

Experience cafe-quality coffee at home. Pause, skip, or cancel your subscription whenever you want.
howSteps.text: Brew & enjoy Experience cafe-quality coffee at home. Pause, skip, or cancel your subscription whenever you want.

faqList.html: Absolutely. You can pause, skip a delivery, or cancel your plan at any time through your account dashboard. No hidden fees, no hassle.
faqList.text: Can I pause or cancel my subscription? Absolutely. You can pause, skip a delivery, or cancel your plan at any time through your account dashboard. No hidden fees, no hassle.

faqList.html: Your beans are roasted fresh to order within 24 hours of shipping. We never ship beans older than 5 days to ensure peak flavor.
faqList.text: When are the beans roasted? Your beans are roasted fresh to order within 24 hours of shipping. We never ship beans older than 5 days to ensure peak flavor.

faqList.html: Yes! Shipping is entirely free on all subscription orders within the continental United States.
faqList.text: Is shipping really free? Yes! Shipping is entirely free on all subscription orders within the continental United States.

faqList.html: Definitely. You can curate your own box from our selection of roasts, or let us surprise you with our curator's choice based on your taste profile.
faqList.text: Can I choose which beans I get? Definitely. You can curate your own box from our selection of roasts, or let us surprise you with our curator's choice based on your taste profile.

content.ctaText: Join 12,000+ subscribers who upgraded their mornings. Get 50% off your first bag when you start a plan today.
